/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.4 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/scpi_cpp_demo.dir/ui/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scpi_cpp_demo.dir/core/src/ScpiClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/scpi_cpp_demo.dir/transport/src/TcpTransport.cpp.o -o scpi_cpp_demo
